meaning: n.上抛,向上投掷之物,排气竖坑adj.向上抛的,向上的
examples: Once an object has been upcast to an interface type, only the members specified in the interface can be used.
The idea of inheriting from a base class without being able to downcast to it or upcast to the base just seemed silly.
When you use the upcast operator, the compiler attempts to infer the type you are converting to from the context.
